Skip to contents
taxdiv 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Getting Started
    • Introduction to taxdiv
    • taxdiv Paketi Kullanim Rehberi (Turkce)

Package index

Classical Diversity Indices

Standard diversity indices widely used in ecology. Shannon-Wiener (Shannon, 1948) and Simpson (Simpson, 1949) indices.

shannon()
Shannon Diversity Index
simpson()
Simpson Diversity Index

Clarke & Warwick Taxonomic Distinctness

Path-length-based taxonomic distinctness measures following Warwick & Clarke (1995) and Clarke & Warwick (1998, 1999, 2001).

delta()
Taxonomic Diversity Index (Delta)
delta_star()
Taxonomic Distinctness (Delta*)
avtd()
Average Taxonomic Distinctness (Delta+)
vartd()
Variation in Taxonomic Distinctness (Lambda+)

Ozkan pTO Method

Deng entropy-based taxonomic diversity indices (Ozkan, 2018; Deng, 2016; Dempster, 1967; Shafer, 1976).

ozkan_pto()
Calculate Ozkan's Taxonomic Diversity Index (pTO)
pto_components()
Calculate All Eight pTO Components (Convenience Wrapper)
deng_entropy_level()
Calculate Deng Entropy at a Single Taxonomic Level

Ozkan pTO Pipeline

Stochastic resampling, jackknife estimation, sensitivity analysis, and the full three-run pipeline for Ozkan pTO.

ozkan_pto_jackknife()
Jackknife Analysis for Ozkan's pTO Index (Islem 1 / Run 1)
ozkan_pto_resample()
Stochastic Resampling of Ozkan's pTO Index (Islem 2 / Run 2)
ozkan_pto_sensitivity()
Sensitivity Analysis of Ozkan's pTO Index (Islem 3 / Run 3)
ozkan_pto_full()
Full Ozkan pTO Pipeline (Islem 1 + 2 + 3)

Batch Analysis & Comparison

Multi-site batch processing and multi-community index comparison. Computes species count and 14 diversity indices per site/community.

batch_analysis()
Batch Analysis from a Single Data Frame
compare_indices()
Compare All Diversity Indices Side by Side

Simulation & Rarefaction

Funnel plot simulation for expected index distributions and sample-based rarefaction curves with bootstrap confidence intervals.

simulate_td()
Simulate Expected AvTD/VarTD Under Random Sampling
rarefaction_taxonomic()
Taxonomic Diversity Rarefaction

Visualization

Seven specialized plot types for taxonomic diversity analysis.

plot_funnel()
Funnel Plot for AvTD/VarTD
plot_rarefaction()
Plot Taxonomic Rarefaction Curve
plot_iteration()
Plot pTO Iteration Results from Run 2 or Run 3
plot_radar()
Radar (Spider) Chart for Multi-Community Index Comparison
plot_heatmap()
Plot Taxonomic Distance Heatmap
plot_bubble()
Bubble Chart of Species Contributions to Diversity
plot_taxonomic_tree()
Plot Taxonomic Tree as a Dendrogram

Utility Functions

Helper functions for taxonomic tree construction and pairwise taxonomic distance computation.

build_tax_tree()
Build a Taxonomic Tree from Species Data
tax_distance_matrix()
Compute Taxonomic Distance Matrix

Datasets

Example ecological community datasets for demonstrations.

anatolian_trees
Anatolian Forest Trees: Multi-Site Species Data
gazi_comm
Example Community Vector: 8 Anatolian Tree Species
gazi_gytk
Example Taxonomy: 8 Anatolian Tree Species

On this page

Developed by Muhammet Murat Gorgoz, Mehmet Guvenc Negiz, Kursad Ozkan.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
